meta.title: ISA Updates
meta.description:
Andrey Ristaino of ISA covers the latest in ISASecure certifications, the ISA Global Cybersecurity Alliance (ISAGCA), and project LOGIIC. 

There is a compelling reason to participate in ISA at the end.
